name: ABC15 Operation Safe Roads tipline
beat: AZ traffic safety, dangerous intersections, road infrastructure
story_relevance_note: ABC15's dedicated traffic-safety investigations inbox, masthead-published. Buckeye Durango/Yuma intersection rejection of FHWA proven safety countermeasure is the exact dangerous-intersection story this desk covers daily.

name: MAG (Maricopa Association of Governments)
beat: regional transportation planning, MPO, Prop 479 implementation
story_relevance_note: MAG is the federally-designated MPO for the Maricopa region including Buckeye. Public Contact-Us page lists exec director Audra Koester Thomas, transportation deputy directors Tom Remes / Patrick Stone, communications director Laurie King. Buckeye's roundabout-rejection vote affects MAG-funded arterial planning.

name: Allie Seligman
story_relevance_note: Cronkite News Phoenix bureau reporter (mailto verified on staff page). West Valley council overriding ADOT-aligned engineering recommendation is reportable Cronkite News public-policy material.
